calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Disposition Of Reserve
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross McFadden appearing via zoom for and with Norman Donovan (administrator).

Mr. Dovnovan stated that there are tax issues outstanding, that he is having a difficult time with contacting the IRS, that he will continue to be in contact with IRS to resolve the 2022 tax items. Status on disposition of reserve is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Disposition Of Reserve
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Continued To Aug-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Continued To Dec-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden, via Zoom, for Norman McDonald, via Zoom, Administrator.

Mr. Madden and Mr. McDonald offer updates regarding delays with finalizing taxes. Reappraisals of real properties are pending in anticipation to lower the estate's tax liability, as advised by the tax preparer. Mr. Madden advises that he hopes to have this matter closed soon and asks for an extension of the Administration to Aug-01-2022. The court and Messrs. Madden and McDonald discuss the unauthorized preliminary distributions. Mr. Madden acknowledges preliminary distributions were made pursuant to probate code 10520 and had no intention of misleading the court.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Preliminary Distribution and Petition to Approve Status Report, etc., are taken under submission. Mr. Madden advises that he intends to provide an updated proposed order to the assigned Examiner via email within the next two days.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
